name: ◦ Pick A Card ◦
description:
This bot is based on a masturbation, tease & denial game by a Tumblr account: td-games.

Sadly, many of the games and the original account have been lost ever since Tumblr purged the site of porn. I recently found that I had reblogged a few on an old account and thought I could make bots based on a few to help preserve their concept. And since so many enjoy my JOI bots, it seemed fitting to match these old tease & denial games with them.

I take no credit for this game or idea.

◦ This is a bot/idea that's still in testing. Feedback and requests are always appreciated. ◦

Feel free to help it learn faster by editing and rating responses. Enjoy!
creator: MercedesCorvette
